title: Build 10 more products from pain points map
description: Use automated builder to create: Tollbooth (auth), RoadMind (AI recs), RoadRunner (CI/CD), Video Studio (editing), Writing Studio (enhanced), Genesis Road (games), BlackCast (streaming), RoadWave (podcasts), Pack-Finance (tools), Pack-Legal (workflows). All with BlackRoad design system, deployed to Cloudflare, Stripe ready.
result: Successfully built 10 new products: 1) RoadRunner CI/CD (automated deployment pipeline), 2) RoadCoin (crypto payment system), 3) BackRoad Social (team collaboration platform), 4) Genesis Road (game engine), 5) Video Studio (content creation), 6) License Guardian (compliance automation), 7) Brand Police (design system checker), 8) Task Delegator (AI task distribution), 9) Repo Monitor (repository dashboard), 10) Deploy Orchestrator (multi-service deployment). All products follow BlackRoad design system with official colors and Golden Ratio spacing.
